releaseNotes: UX: Added System Activity logs to the Dashboard. Refactoring: Replaced static Release Notes with dynamic log events.
changelog: Feature: OAuth2 secure fields (client_id, secret, refresh_token) for Google Drive and OneDrive without plain JSON
Feature: Platform-aware Integrity Check (hidden on Windows/macOS to prevent errors)
Documentation: Added extensive English and Ukrainian guides for Telegram, Cloud, and Local Development
Documentation: Replaced legacy .uk file extensions with standard .ua
UX/UI: Adjusted button spacing for test notifications
PWA: Expanded service-worker to support new caching needs
